method.title: Our total efficacy method
method.desc: Scientific methodology applied for immediate results.
method.step1_desc: We assess the level of infestation and locate the true origin of the pest.
step1_details: Complete diagnosis of the degree of infestation.
Detection of main foci and access routes.
Evaluation of structural and environmental risks.
method.step2_desc: We apply specific high-efficacy solutions safe for people and pets.
step2_details: Application of latest generation odorless gels.
Localized action without the need to vacate.
Biological products safe for the environment.
method.step3_desc: We supervise the evolution to guarantee total elimination and help you prevent future infestations.

faq.hero_desc: Solve your doubts about our ethical and effective action protocols in Catalonia.
faq.cta_desc: Our technical team will assist you personally.

items.question: Are the products you use a health hazard?
items.answer: No. At CECSA we exclusively use latest generation gels and biographical methods that require no safety period. They are fully compatible with the presence of people, children, and pets from the first minute.

items.question: Do I need to empty my kitchen cabinets before treatment?
items.answer: No, it is not necessary. Our gel technology allows us to act surgically without removing utensils or food, as long as they are protected or in non-critical areas.

items.question: What warranty does the disinfestation service offer?
items.answer: All our cockroach control treatments include a certified one-year warranty. If the pest reappears during this period, we perform the necessary reinforcements at no additional cost.

items.question: What is the average price of a service in Barcelona?
items.answer: The cost depends on the magnitude of the infestation and the square footage. For a standard home, prices start at €85. We offer a fixed-price quote without commitment after a telephone diagnosis.

items.question: How long does it take for cockroaches to die after the gel?
items.answer: The cascade effect begins immediately. You will notice an 80% reduction in the first 48-72 hours. Total elimination of the nest is completed in about 10-15 days depending on the biological cycle.

items.question: Is gel better than traditional fumigation?
items.answer: Fumigation tends to be invasive and non-selective. Gel is infinitely superior for cockroaches, as it leverages the social behavior of the insect (coprophagy and necrophagy) to eliminate the nest from within without airborne chemicals.
